purpose: Plans the common player base body source/pixel variants for both genders and six skin tones before face, hair, armor, weapon, and class sprite production.

coordinateConvention.pixelOutputRule: Pixel variants must project body anchors from the approved source variant by normalized coordinates.

rules: Match the approved body pose, camera framing, head scale, lighting, and underwear style.
Keep clean high-detail edges; do not add pixelated outlines to source variants.
Derive from the matching approved source body variant.
Keep crisp pixel edges while preserving anchor positions and silhouette.

generationRules: Generate source variants before pixel variants.
Do not change body pose, stance, hand position, foot baseline, head scale, camera framing, or underwear style between skin tones.
Use transparent background when possible; otherwise use a flat easy-to-key background.
Face and hair are separate overlays unless the specific task is a face or hair source variant.
Runtime anchors remain shared per gender and are not recalculated from generated image bounds.
